zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Wingfield於1430年出生在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington27歲，母親Elizabeth Goushill26歲。他於1450年與Elizabeth FitzLewis在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1461年被列為created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv。他去世於1481年5月11日在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆享年51歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可列黑林加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Wingfield于1430年出生在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington27岁，母亲Elizabeth Goushill26岁。他于1450年与Elizabeth FitzLewis在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1461年被列为created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv。他去世于1481年5月11日在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆享年51岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可列黑林加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Wingfield was born in 1430, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Goushill, was 26. He married Elizabeth FitzLewis in 1450, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 3 daughters. In 1461, at the age of 31, his occupation is listed as created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv. He died on 11 May 1481, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Wingfield est né en 1430, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Goushill, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzLewis en 1450, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 3 filles. En 1461, à l’âge de 31 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1481, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Wingfield 1430 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Goushill 26. Er hat 1450 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England Elizabeth FitzLewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1461, als er 31 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Mai 1481 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Letheringham, Suffolk, England und wurde in Letheringham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wingfield è nato il nel 1430 nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Goushill, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzLewis nel 1450, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1461, all'età di 31 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv. Morì il 11 maggio 1481, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Letheringham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Wingfieldが1430年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Wingfield of Letheringtonは27歳，母Elizabeth Goushillは26歳であった。1450年にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでElizabeth FitzLewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1461年，31歳の時，職業はcreated knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward ivと記録されている。彼は1481年5月11日にイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムで51歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクレスエリンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Wingfield(이)가 1430년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Goushill(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1450년 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 Elizabeth FitzLewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1461년, 31세의 나이로 그의 직업은 created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv이었다. 그는 1481년 5월 11일 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레더잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Wingfield nasceu em 1430, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Goushill, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzLewis em 1450, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1461, com 31 anos, sua profissão aparece como created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1481, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Wingfield родился в 1430 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Goushill, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzLewis в 1450 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1461 году, в возрасте 31 год,  он работал по профессии created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv. Он умер 11 мая 1481 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия.

sm.from 1443 to 1444: mai le 1443 e o'o I le 1444

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Wingfield nació en 1430, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Goushill, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzLewis en 1450, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1461, a la edad de 31 años, su ocupación registrada era created knight of the bath at the cornonation of king edward iv. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1481, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
